summary: Completed full testing of Blacklist & Stats Detail features. All 30 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests verified: Business Settings page with blacklist form, Dashboard clickable stat cards opening modals with date range filters.

seed_data_creation: Used existing test business 'Test Real Stripe' (fbb3d0e3-37f2-417b-8cfa-b7fbf24f1ee0) and user 'test@example.com' (52bfb097-5743-4387-9d22-7de8725ffe89)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Blacklist and Stats Detail features fully tested. Key points: (1) Blacklist CRUD at /api/businesses/me/blacklist works with email/phone/user_id identifiers, (2) Blacklist enforcement hides business from search/featured/profile and blocks bookings with 404, (3) Stats detail endpoint at /api/bookings/business/stats-detail supports stat_type (today/pending/revenue/total) with date range filters, (4) Dashboard stat cards are clickable and open modals, (5) Total/revenue modals have date range filter, (6) Business settings page at /business/settings has blacklist management UI, (7) Stripe deposit checkout uses native stripe library (not emergentintegrations)
